title: Migrate documentation to Astro site

source.subject: Remove documentation files; migrate to Astro-based documentation site

body:
Removes legacy in-repo markdown docs and migrates public documentation to the **Astro** site under `site/website`.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`b1e0bc9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/b1e0bc9)
- **Subject:** Remove documentation files; migrate to Astro-based documentation site
- **Completed:** 2026-03-07

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`

## Relation
Docs infrastructure prerequisite for landing/downloads and language book updates.
